title: ProposedAction
description: An agent's draft of a side-effecting action. Always validated before reaching an approval queue. Always serialized — no executable code.

proposal_id.description: Unique ID for this proposal. Used to correlate proposal → approval → dispatch in the audit log.

agent.description: Identifies the agent that produced this draft.

action_type.description: Discriminator. The dispatcher routes on this value.

payload.description: Action-specific payload. Validate against a per-action sub-schema before dispatch.

rationale.description: Why the agent thinks this action is correct. Surfaced to the approver. Not used by the dispatcher.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the agent emitted the draft.

tenant.description: Tenant / workspace / organization scope. Approval and dispatch are tenant-scoped — never global.

expires_at.description: Optional. Proposal is rejected if approved after this time. Prevents stale approvals from firing.

risk.description: Optional. Used to route to different approval channels (e.g. low → auto-approve internal, high → mandatory human).
